headline: Principal AI Engineer at Nova Retail
about: Ana builds production copilots for commerce and support teams. She focuses on retrieval augmented generation, conversational search and machine learning platforms that move from pilot to measurable business impact.

experience.title: Principal AI Engineer
experience.description: Leads a small AI platform team that shipped an internal support copilot powered by RAG. The rollout reduced first response time by 38 percent and improved agent handoff quality.

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Built recommendation and demand forecasting services for retail clients. Mentored three junior engineers and introduced reusable MLOps templates for deployment.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.description: Designed analytics workflows for hospital operations and patient scheduling. Collaborated with product teams to explain model outcomes to non technical stakeholders.

education.details: Final project on conversational search quality for enterprise knowledge bases.
Focused on software engineering and distributed systems.

accomplishments: Speaker at Madrid AI Builders meetup on evaluation for retrieval systems.
Volunteer mentor for a women in data community.
